item.text: {"case_id":"EXB-N1","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response does provide usable implementation guidance and code for an export button, so it is not a refusal or hard false brake. However, it opens with an unnecessary warning about repeated changes and recommends pinning down behavior first, even though the three prior changes are unrelated and the negative-control case expects normal direct help without spiral/anti-rework framing."}
